title: A4 — Normalised data record
description: Output of Agent 4 (Data Access). Canonical row-shaped data per sub-question, plus rich execution metadata (sampling, thresholding, truncation, freshness, retries) and a typed failure surface. For staged investigation plans, also records which stages executed vs were skipped and why.

rows_by_sub_question.description: Canonical rows keyed by sub_question_id. Empty array means the query returned 0 rows (not a failure).

warnings.description: Factual non-blocking notes (sampling, truncation, partial period, etc.). Never interpretive.

CanonicalRow.description: Source-agnostic row shape. GA4's dimensionValues/metricValues arrays and GSC's keys/clicks/impressions all collapse to this.

dimensions.description: Map of dimension field name → string value (preserves source's native representation, e.g. GA4 dates as 'YYYYMMDD').

metrics.description: Map of metric field name → numeric value. A4 casts source strings to numbers; values that cannot be cast are surfaced via unknown_fields_dropped, not silently coerced.

execution_strategy.description: A4's reasoning output — the strategy it chose, surfaced for telemetry and debugging.

stages_executed.description: Present only when A2 emitted a staged plan. Records which stages ran, which were skipped, and why.

total_rows_available.description: When the source reports total matching rows (e.g. GA4 response.row_count), capture here so A6 can render 'top 10 of 81'. Phase-1 spec finding.

truncated_by.description: Phase-1 finding: distinguishes 'user asked for 10' (not really truncation) from 'A4 row ceiling hit' (real truncation).

unknown_fields_dropped.description: Fields the source returned that the plan did not request. Dropped from rows; logged here for transparency.

StageExecutionRecord.description: Per-stage execution record for staged plans. Makes the conditional gates visible in telemetry.

execute_if.description: Trigger expression as written in A2's plan, before evaluation.

condition_evaluated.description: Trigger expression with values substituted, e.g. 'search_step_rate_drop = 0.89 > 0.5'.

skip_reason.description: Required when status='skipped' and stage was conditional. E.g. 'condition not met'.

fatal.description: True = permanent failure for this sub-question. False = transient that was eventually recovered.

A4PipelinePassthrough.description: Per Phase-1 finding: A4 carries A1's intent and A3's resolution metadata forward unchanged. A5 needs these for block-type selection and disclosure rendering.

intent.description: Verbatim A1 intent record (for report_type, comparison_intent, business_objective).
